patch.value: Add --body-file <path> to pm create and pm update so agents can supply long markdown bodies (multi-paragraph, code blocks, tables) from a file instead of escaping huge inline --body strings or doing a second pm append call. Mutually exclusive with inline --body. '-' reads from stdin. Reduces round-trips (project management = context management).
pm create/update --body-file: load body markdown from a file (GH-214)

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Plan: new core helper src/core/io/body-file.ts resolveBodyFileContent(bodyFile, body, readFileImpl?) — reads file (utf8), errors if --body also set (mutually exclusive) or path missing/unreadable. Register --body-file <path> commander option on create+update (direct .option) + add to CREATE_FLAG_CONTRACTS/UPDATE_FLAG_CONTRACTS for completion. Resolve+delete in create/update actions before normalize. CLI-only (no MCP — file paths meaningless over MCP, like history --diff). Mutual-exclusion error mirrors existing guided-error shape.

patch.value: Added --body-file <path> to pm create and pm update via new src/core/io/body-file.ts resolveBodyFileContent helper (CLI-only input alias, mutually exclusive with --body, actionable errors for conflict/empty-path/unreadable). Wired into create+update actions before normalize, CREATE/UPDATE_FLAG_CONTRACTS + zsh/fish completion + contracts golden + docs. 100% unit-covered + in-process integration tests.
